name: AST MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) analysis of source code. Enables AI agents to parse source code into ASTs, query code structure, extract function definitions and class hierarchies, analyze code patterns, and perform structural code analysis — supporting AI-driven code understanding and refactoring workflows.
use_cases: Parsing source code into ASTs from code analysis agents
Extracting function signatures and class structures from codebase understanding agents
Analyzing code patterns and dependencies from refactoring agents
Supporting AI code review with structural code analysis
not_for: Teams with existing LSP-based tools covering the same functionality
best_when: A developer building code analysis or refactoring agents needs structural understanding of source code — using AST parsing to extract code structure beyond simple text search.
avoid_when: Simple grep/regex-based code search satisfies your needs. AST parsing adds complexity — evaluate whether structural analysis is actually required.

auth.notes: Local code analysis — no authentication required.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — open source code analysis tool
pricing.notes: Free open source AST analysis tool.

known_agent_gotchas: Language support varies — verify which programming languages the AST parser supports
AST structure differs by language and parser version — agents must understand language-specific AST
Large codebases can be slow to parse — implement caching or selective file parsing
Community tool at 30 stars — evaluate maintenance before production dependency
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local code parsing. No credentials. Source code processed locally. No external data transmission.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local parsing. No credentials. Source code stays local. Low risk.
